projection.bind: exact validated tcp {kind,host,port} or unix {kind,path} object

authority.principals_order: ascending principal_id UTF-8 bytes after duplicate-ID and duplicate-certificate rejection
authority.planes_order: ascending registered plane string UTF-8 bytes after duplicate rejection
authority.identity_grammar: principal_id, certificate_identity, and entity_id are non-empty canonical IDs <=128 UTF-8 bytes; whitespace, controls, U+FEFF, and /*$#? are forbidden

projection.unknown_members: reject at every deployment-profile object boundary

coverage.reason: the digest binds the precommitted effective configuration; secret/key bytes are never serialized or logged

verification.mismatch: fail closed before session or authority success
